models.title: Barry Diller trusts Sam Altman. But ‘trust is irrelevant’ as AGI nears, he says.
models.summary: Barry Diller defended OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while warning that AGI remains an unpredictable force needing guardrails.
models.title_zh: Barry Diller信任Sam Altman。但他说，随着AGI的临近， “信任无关紧要”。
models.summary_zh: Barry Diller为OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman辩护，同时警告说AGI仍然是一种需要护栏的不可预测的力量。
models.title_en: Barry Diller trusts Sam Altman. But ‘trust is irrelevant’ as AGI nears, he says.
models.summary_en: Barry Diller defended OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while warning that AGI remains an unpredictable force needing guardrails.

models.title: Snap says its $400M deal with Perplexity ‘amicably ended’
models.summary: The deal, announced last November, would have seen Perplexity's AI search engine integrated directly into Snapchat.
models.title_zh: Snap表示，与Perplexity的4亿美元交易“友好结束”
models.summary_zh: 去年11月宣布的这笔交易将使Perplexity的人工智能搜索引擎直接集成到Snapchat中。
models.title_en: Snap says its $400M deal with Perplexity ‘amicably ended’
models.summary_en: The deal, announced last November, would have seen Perplexity's AI search engine integrated directly into Snapchat.

models.title: Is xAI a neocloud now?
models.summary: xAI's real business may be more about building data centers than training AI models.
models.summary_zh: xAI的真正业务可能更多的是建立数据中心，而不是训练AI模型。
models.summary_en: xAI's real business may be more about building data centers than training AI models.

models.title: How Elon Musk left OpenAI, according to Greg Brockman
models.summary: Cutthroat negotiations between startup founders are rarely shared so publicly, especially when a company becomes as world-changing as OpenAI.
models.title_zh: 根据Greg Brockman的说法， Elon Musk是如何离开OpenAI的
models.summary_zh: 创业公司创始人之间的激烈谈判很少公开分享，尤其是当一家公司像OpenAI一样改变世界的时候。
models.title_en: How Elon Musk left OpenAI, according to Greg Brockman
models.summary_en: Cutthroat negotiations between startup founders are rarely shared so publicly, especially when a company becomes as world-changing as OpenAI.
